alerts.title: DeepSeek-V4 arrives with near state-of-the-art intelligence at 1/6th the cost of Opus 4.7, GPT-5.5
alerts.description:
The whale has resurfaced.

alerts.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
alerts.description: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

alerts.title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
alerts.description: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" with current leading models, both open and closed, on reasoning benchmarks.

alerts.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
alerts.description: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

alerts.title: GPT-5.5 Boasts Coding Advancements, But Falls Short of Opus 4.7
alerts.description: While OpenAI has improved the model's coding and tool use ability, it still has room to improve in areas where Anthropic dominates.

alerts.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4-Cyber is More Open Than Claude Mythos
alerts.description: The model could help cybersecurity experts better prepare for attacks.

alerts.title: China's DeepSeek releases preview of long-awaited V4 model as AI race intensifies
alerts.description: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek has released a preview version of its long awaited V4 large language model.

alerts.title: OpenAI announces GPT-5.5, its latest artificial intelligence model
alerts.description: The model is better at coding, using computers and pursuing deeper research capabilities, OpenAI says.

alerts.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 is here, and it's no potato: narrowly beats Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview on Terminal-Bench 2.0
